Projects

Research projects, prototypes, and collaborative investigations presented as a structured archive.

featured

Advanced Carbon Fiber & Composite Materials

An immersive exploration of carbon fiber structures, algorithmic weaving, and predictive material performance.

ongoing

DEMETRA

Precision agriculture and robotic monitoring platform developed as part of the NODES network.

ongoing

Fit4MedRob Balance Board

Rehabilitation and assessment platform focused on balance control and motor recovery within the Fit4MedRob framework.

2024
ongoing

Fit4MedRob DriveSim

Advanced driving simulator for medical research and functional recovery assessment, integrated into the Fit4MedRob ecosystem.
simulators · driving

ongoing

DYNAMICA

PRIN research project focused on dynamic interactions and control in multi-agent robotic systems.

ongoing

AHBI

Human-robot interaction and behavioral intelligence study within the NODES ecosystem.

ongoing

Roboveg

Robotic vision and automation for vegetable processing, developed under the Collabora e Innova program.

Med4Repair

Collabora e Innova initiative developing innovative robotic solutions for medical maintenance and repair tasks.
